input_text: Essential rules for a process of conducting the Medication review
NL_requirements: The system identifies the patient for the medication review.
The pharmacist conducts the medication review.
The system receives the medication history data.
If the risk level is high, the system conducts an advanced medication review.
The system sends the pharmaceutical care plan to the general practitioner.
The pharmacist is responsible for sending the care plan.
The medication evaluation must occur before the care plan is developed.
The medication dosage must never be negative.
The medication review must be completed within 48 hours of identifying the patient.
If the system fails to access patient records, it notifies the pharmacist.
